/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/kmeans.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o kmeans  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libOPENFHEcore.dylib /usr/local/lib/libOPENFHEpke.dylib /usr/local/lib/libOPENFHEbinfhe.dylib
